title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
The ASBA (Application Supported by Blocked Amount) IPO application with IDBI Bank provides you with a convenient and hassle-free way to apply for Initial Public Offerings (IPOs) and participate in the exciting world of stock market investments. With IDBI Bank's ASBA IPO application, you can apply for IPOs online and enjoy several benefits and features that make the process seamless and efficient.
Applying for IPOs has never been easier. With IDBI Bank's ASBA IPO application, you can submit your application online from the comfort of your home or office. There's no need to visit a physical branch or fill out lengthy paperwork.
The ASBA facility allows you to apply for IPOs without blocking the entire amount in your bank account. Only the required amount is temporarily blocked, ensuring that you can continue to earn interest on your funds until the shares are allotted.
IDBI Bank ensures the highest level of security for your online transactions. Your personal and financial information is protected through advanced encryption technology, giving you peace of mind while applying for IPOs.
By using the ASBA IPO application, you eliminate the need for physical applications, cheques, and visiting banks. The entire process can be completed online, saving you time and effort.
Stay informed about the status of your IPO application with real-time updates. You can easily track the progress of your application and receive notifications on the allotment status.
Investing in IPOs/Bonds through ASBA facility offered by IDBI Bank is quick and straightforward process. Follow these simple steps to apply for public issue today.
  1. Visit the IDBI Bank website and log in to your net banking account using your credentials.


  1. Login to your Mobile Banking (Go Mobile+ App) using your credentials.
  2. Navigate to the ASBA IPO application section within the net banking portal/ mobile banking application.
  3. Select the IPO you wish to apply for from the list of available options.
  4. Fill in the necessary details, such as the number of shares, price, and other required information.
  5. Review your application details, ensure accuracy, and submit your application.
  6. The required amount will be temporarily blocked in your account until the IPO shares are allotted.
  7. If the IPO shares are allotted to you, the blocked amount will be debited from your account. In case of non-allotment, the blocked amount will be unblocked and made available for your use. 


  1. Visit your nearest IDBI Bank branch to obtain the application form.
  2. Fill in the required details, such as your personal information, investment amount, bank account details and Demat details.
  3. Submit the completed application duly signed with signature as per your bank record.
  4. The required amount will be temporarily blocked in your account until the IPO shares are allotted.
  5. If the IPO shares are allotted to you, the blocked amount will be debited from your account. In case of non-allotment, the blocked amount will be unblocked and made available for your use.


  * The Online IPO Application is for Individuals, Non Resident (NR), HUF, Minor. Applications cannot be made on behalf of a Corporate, Trust etc.
  * Please note that the sequence of names of the applicants, should be as per the sequence of names held with your Depository account.
  * By default, the Net Banking / Mobile banking user will be the 1st applicant.
  * A hold would be marked on the total amount, at the highest price bid by the applicant.
  * Application money will remain blocked up to the finalization on the basis of allotment.
  * Further, if the information furnished by the applicant is incorrect, the Bid is liable to be rejected and the Company and Bank would not be liable for losses, if any.
  * Please ensure that the name on the PAN card matches with the Demat Holder's name
